posts.author: Olga.S (Olga Shulkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
an option to add 3rd dimension in Gantt view.

For example-

  1. Group by- exist

  2. Color by- exist

  3. 3rd dimension- shape by for example (to add shapes to the tabs on the Gannt view)

So I can receive visual view in 3 dimensions in the Gantt.
